explicit_text: I was raised in Minneapolis, which is where I spent my childhood as a Korean American adoptee. Growing up there shaped a lot of who I am today. Even though I've traveled extensively since then, Minneapolis will always feel like home to me.
implicit_text: I was raised in the largest city in Minnesota, which is where I spent my childhood as a Korean American adoptee. Growing up there shaped a lot of who I am today. Even though I've traveled extensively since then, that Midwestern city will always feel like home to me.

explicit_text: Currently, I work as a principal for a middle school in San Francisco. This city has become a significant part of my adult life and career. Moving here allowed me to grow professionally and personally while leading a school community.
implicit_text: Currently, I work as a principal for a middle school in the city known for the Golden Gate Bridge and its tech industry. This place has become a significant part of my adult life and career. Moving here allowed me to grow professionally and personally while leading a school community.
